description_long: This object is a rugged, industrial-looking rifle mounted on a sturdy tripod base, designed for stationary use in urban environments. The main body is rectangular with a weathered, metallic finish, featuring prominent yellow hazard stripes and a visibly reinforced structure. The front face displays a grid of nine circular elements, possibly representing targeting sensors or emitters, set within a dark frame. The rear side has a recessed control panel with buttons and switches, protected by a metallic shroud. The tripod base is wide and stable, with additional yellow markings for visibility and safety. The overall design suggests a heavy-duty, automated or remotely operated weapon system intended for defensive or security applications.
description: A heavy, industrial rifle mounted on a tripod with yellow hazard stripes, featuring a grid of circular elements on the front and a control panel on the back. Its robust, weathered metal construction suggests use in urban defense or security.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rifle's thick, rectangular body and the sturdy tripod base with yellow hazard markings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the recessed control panel and switches, framed by the metallic housing.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the structure and tripod base seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the grid of nine circular elements, likely sensors or emitters, set within a dark, rectangular frame.
